name: savePreparedKeyboardButton
description: Stores a keyboard button that can be used by a user within a Mini App

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the target user that can use the button

parameters.name: button
parameters.description: A JSON-serialized object describing the button to be saved. The button must be of the type request_users, request_chat, or request_managed_bot.
